query:
SELECT s.id as streetId, s.name as streetName, 
  COUNT(g.id) as googleCount
FROM streets s
LEFT JOIN googlePlaceRestaurants g ON g.streetId = s.id AND g.isActive = 1
GROUP BY s.id, s.name
HAVING googleCount > 0
ORDER BY googleCount DESC;
